calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-20-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:55am, Dept. 525
Judge Pro Tem John Gulick, Jr., clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. Respondent Jeanette Mayorga-Thery appears in Pro Per, Appellant Foad Laghaei appears in Pro Per for Yuliya Sokolova DBA Valencia Auto AKA Valencia Auto Wholesale. The two parties are sworn. Parties present their respective cases in the narrative. No witnesses are sworn and no new evidence is identified or admitted.
10:42am
At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Court retains evidence previously admitted in the small claims action.
